interfaces.name: getHomePageContent
interfaces.description: Get homepage hero content, key strengths, and primary call-to-action sections.

interfaces.name: getFeaturedVoiceoverDemos
interfaces.description: Get a small selection of featured commercial voiceover demos for the homepage, with inline playback metadata.

is_favorited.description: Whether this demo is already in the user's favorites list

interfaces.name: getFeaturedShowreels
interfaces.description: Get a small selection of featured drama showreels for the homepage, with inline playback metadata.

is_in_casting_list.description: Whether this showreel is already in the casting list

interfaces.name: getNewsletterPreferencesOptions
interfaces.description: Get available newsletter areas of interest, frequency options, and default opt-in flags for the footer signup form.

weekly_tips_default_enabled.description: Whether weekly tips are pre-selected by default

interfaces.name: subscribeToNewsletter
interfaces.description: Subscribe the user to the newsletter with selected interests, summary frequency, and opt-in preferences.

interfaces.name: getVoiceoverPageContent
interfaces.description: Get static and semi-static content for the Voiceover page, including overview and studio/FAQ sections.

interfaces.name: getVoiceoverFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter and sort options for the Voiceover Demos tab.

interfaces.name: searchVoiceoverDemos
interfaces.description: Search and filter voiceover demos for the Demos tab, supporting category, language, duration, rating, style, and sort options.

interfaces.name: getVoiceoverDemoDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific voiceover demo, including runtime, ratings, tags, and recent reviews.

parameters.name: demoId
parameters.description: Identifier of the VoiceoverDemo (usually from the URL on the detail page)

interfaces.name: addVoiceoverDemoToFavorites
interfaces.description: Add a voiceover demo to the user's Favorites list. Creates the favorites list internally if needed.

parameters.name: demoId
parameters.description: Identifier of the VoiceoverDemo to favorite

interfaces.name: getFavoriteVoiceoverDemos
interfaces.description: Get the current list of favorited voiceover demos with basic display information.

added_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime when this favorite was added

interfaces.name: addDemoToProjectShortlist
interfaces.description: Add a voiceover demo to the current Project Shortlist, creating a shortlist container if one does not yet exist.

parameters.name: demoId
parameters.description: Identifier of the VoiceoverDemo to add to the project shortlist

interfaces.name: getProjectShortlist
interfaces.description: Get the current Project Shortlist and its items, if any exist.

interfaces.name: getActingPageContent
interfaces.description: Get static and semi-static content for the Acting page, including overview copy.

interfaces.name: getActingFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter and sort options for the Acting Showreels tab.

interfaces.name: searchShowreels
interfaces.description: Search and filter acting showreels by genre, year filmed, duration, and sort order.

interfaces.name: getShowreelDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific acting showreel, including runtime, year filmed, and casting-relevant metadata.

parameters.name: showreelId
parameters.description: Identifier of the Showreel (usually from the URL on the detail page)

interfaces.name: addShowreelToCastingList
interfaces.description: Add an acting showreel to the Casting List, creating the list if it does not yet exist.

parameters.name: showreelId
parameters.description: Identifier of the Showreel to add to the casting list

interfaces.name: getCastingList
interfaces.description: Get the current Casting List and its selected showreels, if any exist.

interfaces.name: getRatesAndQuotesPageContent
interfaces.description: Get baseline rate information, example packages, and explanatory content for the Rates & Quotes page.

interfaces.name: getRateCalculatorOptions
interfaces.description: Get options and defaults for the Instant Quote Calculator: project types, usage durations, territories, and default values.

interfaces.name: calculateInstantRateQuote
interfaces.description: Calculate and persist an instant rate quote for the given configuration, returning the estimated fee.

interfaces.name: submitQuoteInquiry
interfaces.description: Submit a rate quote inquiry using the current calculator configuration and contact details.

parameters.name: budget_limit
parameters.description: Optional budget cap in USD, e.g., 600

interfaces.name: getContactPageContent
interfaces.description: Get content and metadata for the Contact & Booking page, including general contact info.

interfaces.name: submitBookingRequest
interfaces.description: Submit a booking request for a recording or on-camera session, including date, time, time zone, and preferred connection methods.

parameters.name: session_time
parameters.description: Local start time in 'HH:MM' 24-hour or 'HH:MM AM/PM' format, e.g., '10:00 AM'

session_start.description: ISO 8601 datetime computed from date, time, and timezone

interfaces.name: submitContactMessage
interfaces.description: Submit a general contact message (non-booking) via the Contact page.

interfaces.name: getClientsTestimonialsPageContent
interfaces.description: Get intro content and client type descriptions for the Clients & Testimonials page.

interfaces.name: getTestimonialFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available client type and year-based filter options and sorting options for testimonials.

interfaces.name: searchTestimonials
interfaces.description: Filter and list testimonials by client type and year, with preview and full quote available.

interfaces.name: addClientToFavorites
interfaces.description: Mark a client as a favorite from a testimonial, adding them to the Favorite Clients view.

parameters.name: clientId
parameters.description: Identifier of the Client to favorite

interfaces.name: getFavoriteClients
interfaces.description: Get the Favorite Clients list, sorted as requested, including associated testimonial context.

interfaces.name: getProjectPlannerPageContent
interfaces.description: Get introductory content and configuration for the Project Planner page.

max_recommended_duration_hours.description: Recommended maximum total session duration, e.g., 3 hours

interfaces.name: getProjectPlannerServiceOptions
interfaces.description: Get the available voiceover, acting, and other service options that can be combined in a project plan.

interfaces.name: saveProjectPlan
interfaces.description: Create and save a project plan with selected service items, computing the total duration hours.

service_option_id.description: Identifier of the ServiceOption being added

within_recommended_duration.description: Whether total_duration_hours is within the recommended maximum

interfaces.name: getAboutPageContent
interfaces.description: Get bio, studio, FAQ, and representation content for the About page.

interfaces.name: getPrivacyPolicyContent
interfaces.description: Get the full privacy policy content and last-updated date.

interfaces.name: getTermsOfUseContent
interfaces.description: Get the full terms of use content and last-updated date.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateFavoriteVoiceoverList
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to get or create the user's FavoriteVoiceoverDemo list in persistent storage.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateProjectShortlist
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to get or create a ProjectShortlist record for the current user context.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCastingList
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to get or create a CastingList record for the current user context.

helperFunctions.name: _calculateDisplayDuration
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to convert a duration in seconds to a human-readable 'M:SS' string.

helperFunctions.name: _calculateProjectPlanTotals
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to compute total session duration for a project plan based on selected ServiceOptions and quantities.

helperFunctions.name: _calculateRateEstimateInternal
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper used by calculateInstantRateQuote to compute the estimated fee for a RateQuote.

helperFunctions.name: _validateBookingDateTime
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to validate and combine session_date, session_time, and timezone into a proper session_start datetime.

helperFunctions.name: _applyTestimonialsFilters
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to filter and sort testimonials by client type, year, and sort order.
